creator: xmj@chaot.net
text:
Please close this PR; it was created due to a bug in abf62be and has been superseded by ports/187631.


On Sun, Mar 16, 2014 at 09:50:01AM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
